violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Wooden platforms and bases for the ice machines in the back and bar are bare wood. These need to be painted or sealed.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. Plates on the storage shelves above the three compartment sink were not inverted or covered.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with sufficient mechanical ventilation. The exhaust fans for the men’s and women’s restrooms were not working.

Lighting. — --Lighting did not have protective shielding in areas where there is exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, or unwrapped single-service items. The light over the ice machine in the back room is missing the shield.
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
